name: notion-extension
description: Notion database querying with people property filters, relation property updates, page-body image upload/read, and files-property attachment management. Designed for Waggle plugin.

tools.name: notion-query
tools.description: Query a Notion database with server-side filtering, sorting, and pagination. Supports people property filters (Assignee) that the Notion hosted MCP cannot handle. Accepts page_size / start_cursor / filter_properties so the caller can drive pagination and projection on large databases.

tools.name: notion-update-relation
tools.description: Update a relation property on a Notion page. Supports replace (set exact list) and append (merge with existing, dedup) modes.

tools.name: notion-upload-image
tools.description: Append an image block to a Notion page body from a local file (Notion File Upload API, max 20MB) or an external URL. Requires the integration's 'Insert content' capability.

tools.name: notion-read-images
tools.description: Read images from a Notion page body and return them as inline image content the model can see, with a JSON summary mapping block IDs to images.

tools.name: notion-set-files-property
tools.description: Set or append files on a Notion files-type page property (e.g. Attachments) from local files (Notion File Upload API, max 20MB) and/or external URLs. Supports replace and append modes. Requires the integration's 'Insert content' capability for uploads.

notion_token.title: Notion Internal Integration Token
notion_token.description: Your Notion internal integration token (ntn_...). Create one at https://www.notion.so/profile/integrations with Read content, Update content, and Insert content capabilities, then connect it to your Waggle page.
